title: Business Designer
required_skills: Business design / strategy / innovation management experience (3–6 years)
User research, market analysis, and insight generation
Customer clinics and design thinking methodologies
Analytical and strategic thinking — translating complex insights into actionable concepts
Bachelor's degree in Business, Design, Research, Innovation Management, or related field
matched_skills: User research and market analysis — Market Intelligence Specialist at Minth Group; 'Market Strategy & Insights' skill
Market segmentation and intelligence — direct match to insight generation requirement
Cross-cultural and multi-market experience — EMEA, APAC coverage; cross-functional team coordination at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC
Analytical and strategic thinking — C-level data storytelling; campaign and market analytics
English fluency — international career across multiple countries and companies
Relevant degree implied by professional background and role seniority
missing_skills: Automotive or mobility sector experience — no automotive background in CV
Design thinking and customer clinic facilitation — not explicitly in CV
Direct business design or innovation management role title or experience
core_responsibilities: Conduct qualitative and quantitative customer and market research to identify needs, behaviors, and trends in international markets
Plan, support, and facilitate customer clinics and workshops using user-centered design methods
Support product strategy development and contribute to product roadmaps and business case development
Act as interface between local Germany teams and China headquarters, aligning strategic objectives across regions
Provide structured frameworks and inputs to the design team, ensuring concepts align with business goals and customer insights
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Market Intelligence Specialist experience at Minth Group as the closest analog to customer and market insight generation for product strategy
Emphasize multi-market (EMEA, APAC) experience and cross-cultural coordination to address the Germany–China interface requirement
Reframe C-level data storytelling as strategic insight presentation to senior and cross-regional stakeholders
Showcase any workshop facilitation or structured research experience (e.g., from Hapag-Lloyd CX project coordination or HSBC PMO)
Position PMO background (HSBC) as evidence of structured process thinking and cross-functional alignment — relevant to design process enablement
Explicitly acknowledge or reframe Minth Group's manufacturing/automotive adjacency as sector proximity if applicable
